en_title: Valve Says Steam Deck 2 Is Getting Closer, but Still Not Ready Yet
cn_title: Valve称Steam Deck 2更近了，但时机仍未到
subtitle: 等待代际飞跃
opus_summary: Valve工程师称Steam Deck 2开发进度更近，但尚未见到所需的代际飞跃芯片。Intel Arc G3虽已推出，但因功耗与续航权衡未获Valve认可。团队正全力开发下一代，当前重点仍是Steam Machine。

paragraphs.en: The Steam Machine is officially ready to launch, but that hasn’t stopped us from wondering how close Valve is to unveiling the long-awaited Steam Deck 2. Speaking to IGN ahead of today's Steam Machine review , Valve’s engineers hinted that the Steam Deck 2 is closer than ever, but that they still haven’t seen the “generational leap” they’re waiting for to make a second-generation Deck worth it.
paragraphs.cn: Steam Machine已正式就绪，但这并不影响我们继续追问Valve距离发布那台备受期待的Steam Deck 2还有多远。在今天的Steam Machine评测发布前，Valve工程师向IGN暗示，Steam Deck 2比以往任何时候都更近了，但他们仍未看到值得推出第二代Deck的「代际飞跃」。

paragraphs.en: “I'd say we're closer than we were the last time we talked,” said Valve Engineer Pierre-Loup Griffais. “We’re definitely getting there.”
paragraphs.cn: 「我觉得比上次我们聊的时候更近了，」Valve工程师Pierre-Loup Griffais说，「我们确实快到那一步了。」

paragraphs.en: For those keeping track, Griffais told us Valve has a “pretty good idea” of what Steam Deck 2 is going to be in November of last year , and reiterated they were “hard at work” when we spoke ahead of the Steam Controller launch earlier this year .
paragraphs.cn: 梳理一下时间线：去年11月，Griffais告诉我们Valve对Steam Deck 2是什么样已经有了「相当清晰的想法」；今年早些时候，在Steam Controller发售前我们再次交流时，他又强调团队正「全力投入」。

paragraphs.en: In the time since then, a new generation handheld gaming processor hit the market – the new Intel Arc G3, which will launch in the $1,799 MSI Claw 8 EX AI+ , as well as a handful of other Windows-based handhelds in the coming weeks.
paragraphs.cn: 在那之后，新一代掌机游戏处理器已经面世——全新的Intel Arc G3，该芯片将搭载于售价1799美元(约合人民币1万元)的MSI Claw 8 EX AI+，未来几周还会出现在多款Windows掌机上。

paragraphs.en: The Arc G3 is a powerful chip to be sure, but it still wasn’t enough to move the needle for Valve.
paragraphs.cn: Arc G3无疑是一颗性能强劲的芯片，但对Valve来说，它仍然不足以扭转局面。

paragraphs.en: “I would say that the new chips that are coming out are still in power envelopes that are not quite the right segment that you'd want for a true handheld experience,” Griffais said. “I think a lot of them are more low-end laptop chips or playing in that sort of form factor that are then repurposed for handhelds and maybe not leading to, I guess the trade-off that we would've chosen in terms of power and better life and that and all that.”
paragraphs.cn: 「我觉得，目前推出的新芯片，其功耗范围仍不太符合真正掌机体验所需的区间，」Griffais说，「我认为很多这类芯片更像是低端笔记本芯片，或者说属于那种形态的部件，后来被改用于掌机，这或许无法带来我们在性能与电池续航等方面的取舍平衡——至少不是我们会选的那种折中。」

paragraphs.en: In other words, there’s likely enough power in the chips coming out these days, but they wouldn’t be able to hit those numbers while also maintaining the kind of battery life that Valve wants to see in its next-generation handheld. Of course, the ongoing RAM crisis is likely a factor as well, and I don’t doubt that Valve would prefer to wait until supply – and prices – return to more normal levels on that front before committing to putting out a new handheld, especially if it hopes to launch at or near the original price point of the Steam Deck, which itself recently saw a significant price hike .
paragraphs.cn: 换句话说，现阶段的芯片或许性能足够，但要在维持Valve对下一代掌机所期望的电池续航的同时达到这些数字就不太可能了。当然，持续的RAM危机很可能也是一个因素，而且我毫不怀疑Valve更愿意等到供应和价格恢复到更正常的水平后再推出新掌机，尤其如果它希望以接近Steam Deck首发价的价格上市的话——而Steam Deck本身最近已经大幅涨价。

paragraphs.en: All that said, Griffais was clear that a Steam Deck 2 is still in the works.
paragraphs.cn: 话虽如此，Griffais明确表示Steam Deck 2仍在开发中。

paragraphs.en: “We're working towards our next gen for sure,” Griffais said. “We'll definitely be talking about that in the coming years, but right now we're focusing on Machine.”
paragraphs.cn: Griffais说道：「我们肯定在朝着下一代产品努力。」「我们肯定会在未来几年讨论这个话题，但现在我们专注于Machine。」

paragraphs.en: For more on the Steam Machine, check out our full review .
paragraphs.cn: 欲了解更多关于Steam Machine的信息，请查阅我们的完整评测。

paragraphs.en: Bo Moore is IGN's Senior Manager of Tech. You can find him online @usebomswisely.
paragraphs.cn: Bo Moore是IGN的科技高级经理。你可以在线上找到他 @usebomswisely。
